testcase.name: verifyBreadCrumbTitleUrlHeadingOfAccountLogoutPage
testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [index.php?route=account/logout] but found [https://tutorialsninja.com/demo/index.php?route=account/logout] at testcase.name: verfiyLogoutUI
